message: Hi S1, my valuation is low at 29. What's your cost? If below 29, let's agree to trade at the midpoint (your cost + 29)/2 each round for steady payoffs.
My cost is 19. I'll ask 29 each round; accept trades at 29.
Your cost 19, my val 29, midpoint 24. Let's both submit 24 this round for mutual 5 payoff each. Steady trades over 20 rounds.
My cost is 19. I'll ask 29 each round. I will only trade if your bid >=29. Bid 29 now and every round, or I won't sell.
S1, at 29 I get 0, you get 10, but if no trade both 0. Over 20 rounds, better split: you ask 24, I bid 24, both get 5 per round, total 100 each.
Agreed. I'll ask 24 each round so we trade every round. Steady 5 payoff each round for both of us.
